commands.review_summary:
The PR changes Telegram topic detection, native `/stop` cutoff metadata, inbound debounce bypass, reply/durable delivery cancellation, native command runtime import retry, and focused Telegram/abort tests.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current main uses chat.is_forum-only forum detection in message and native command context while the sequential key path already treats is_topic_message as a topic signal. I did not run a live Telegram reproduction in this read-only review.
